'''gap챦fth챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zambra|zambra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zambra|zambra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| gap챦fth챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦fth|gap챦fth챦fth]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦fj|gap챦fth챦fj]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦fsh|gap챦fth챦fsh]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f|gap챦fth챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:gap챦fp챦fth챦fth|gap챦fp챦fth챦fth]] || [[word:gap챦fp챦fth챦fj|gap챦fp챦fth챦fj]] || [[word:gap챦fp챦fth챦fsh|gap챦fp챦fth챦fsh]] || [[word:gap챦fp챦fth챦f|gap챦fp챦fth챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦f|gap챦fth챦f챦f]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦f|gap챦fth챦f챦f]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦f|gap챦fth챦f챦f]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦f|gap챦fth챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦fth|gap챦fth챦fth]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦fj|gap챦fth챦fj]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦fsh|gap챦fth챦fsh]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f|gap챦fth챦f]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦fl|gap챦fth챦f챦fl]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦fl|gap챦fth챦f챦fl]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦fl|gap챦fth챦f챦fl]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦fl|gap챦fth챦f챦fl]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦f챦f|gap챦fth챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦f챦f|gap챦fth챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦f챦f|gap챦fth챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦f챦f|gap챦fth챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦fn|gap챦fth챦f챦fn]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦fn|gap챦fth챦f챦fn]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦fn|gap챦fth챦f챦fn]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦fn|gap챦fth챦f챦fn]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦foro|gap챦fth챦f챦foro]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦foro|gap챦fth챦f챦foro]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦foro|gap챦fth챦f챦foro]] || [[word:gap챦fth챦f챦foro|gap챦fth챦f챦foro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words fc10857]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|60977ac}}
